name: create_payment
description: Process a payment using Square's payment gateway. Supports card payments, digital wallets, and other payment methods. Requires a source ID from a payment form or digital wallet.

parameters.name: source_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the payment source (e.g., nonce from payment form, card ID, or digital wallet token).

parameters.name: amount_money
parameters.description: The amount to charge in the smallest currency unit. Include amount and currency fields.

parameters.name: idempotency_key
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the request to prevent duplicate charges. Use a UUID.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Optional. The ID of the customer associated with this payment.

parameters.name: reference_id
parameters.description: Optional. A reference ID from your system (e.g., order number or invoice ID).
